name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Dooya
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Dooya RF remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The 24-bit ID to send. Each remote has a unique one.

config_entries.label: Button
config_entries.description: The 4-bit button to send, between 0 and 15 inclusive.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: The 8-bit channel to send, between 0 and 255 inclusive.

config_entries.label: Check
config_entries.description: The 4-bit check to send. Includes an indication that a button is being held down. See dumper output for more info.
